Players Details

Fixture & Results

| Page | 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 |

Debutant Durgesh bags four as Bengal earn narrow lead

20th December 2019

Debutant Durgesh Dubey combined up with Akash Deep to dismantle Tamil Nadu batting lineup by sharing 7 wickets between them and hand Bengal a narrow 1-run first innings lead in a nail-biting Col C K Nayudu Trophy match today.

Defending Bengal's first innings total of 270 runs Durgesh struck early in the second over of the day. After that Durgesh and Sandipan kept on taking wickets in regular intervals to reduce them to 94/4.

When asked about the hard-earned narrow lead Bengal U23 coach Sourashis Lahiri said: "Lead is always good, whether it's of 1 or 100 runs. The first two days were crucial, two even more crucial days to come."

Read More..

CAB MEDIA DESK

Rio Dutta

Sourav's superb ton lift Bengal U23

19th December 2019

Sourav Paul's superb century along with Agniv Pan's patient 90-ball 52 helped Bengal U23 post 270 all out at the end of their Col C K Nayudu trophy match against Tamil Nadu at JU Second Campus Ground today.

Put to bat first openers gave Bengal a good start till Sudip Gharami went back for 15. After that Bengal lost 3 more wickets to get reduced to 83/4.

Read More..

CAB MEDIA DESK

Rio Dutta

Bengal start with a bang

19th December 2019

Bengal rode on Shahbaz Ahamad and Arnab Nandi's all-round masterclass to thrash heavyweight Kerala by 8 wickets in just three days in their Ranji Trophy opener today.

Resuming the day on 236/6 Bengal took a 68-run first innings lead thanks to Shahbaz's patient 50 off 131 deliveries along with Arnab's 71-ball 29. Mukesh Kumar also added 12 crucial runs at the end.
